LightningComponentBundle.description: A comprehensive form component for collecting contact information with text inputs, email, phone, dropdown, checkboxes, and textarea. Features full validation, accessibility support, and SLDS 2 compliance.

property.name: showFormTitle
property.label: Show Form Title
property.description: Display the form title in the card header

property.name: allowReset
property.label: Allow Reset
property.description: Enable the reset button to clear form fields
